mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{ownerUserId} AND USER_ROLE = 'OWNER'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_STORE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STORES ( STORE_ID, STORE_CODE, STORE_NAME, STORE_PHONE, STORE_ADDRESS, OWNER_USER_ID, STORE_STATUS, CREATE_USER, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, 'S' || #{storeId}, #{storeName}, #{storePhone}, #{storeAddress}, #{ownerUserId}, 'OPEN', 1, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT STORE_ID AS storeId, STORE_CODE AS storeCode, STORE_NAME AS storeName, STORE_PHONE AS storePhone, STORE_ADDRESS AS storeAddress, STORE_STATUS AS storeStatus, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createDate
FROM STORES
WHERE 1 = 1
AND STORE_STATUS = #{status}
AND ( STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STORE_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STORE_PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STORE_ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY STORE_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STORES WHERE 1 = 1
AND STORE_STATUS = #{status}
AND CREATE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND CREATE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ( STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STORE_ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STORE_PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
mapper.update: UPDATE STORES SET STORE_NAME = #{storeName}, STORE_PHONE = #{storePhone}, STORE_ADDRESS = #{storeAddress}, STORE_STATUS = #{storeStatus} WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId}
